# n0brains — Full Reference

> AI-powered crypto intelligence platform. Machine-classified signals from 30+ sources — whales, funding, liquidations, on-chain flows, options/ETF/stablecoin flows, news, macro, congress trades — fused, scored, and delivered via one REST/WebSocket/Webhook/MCP/x402 API. Built for autonomous trading agents.

## What it is

n0brains ingests from 30+ real-time sources, classifies every market event via LLM pipeline, cross-corroborates across sources, and scores it. Each signal includes direction (bullish/bearish/neutral), urgency, confidence, a conviction rating (strong/notable/watch/none), entry/stop/take-profit suggestions, and a composite quality band (A+/A/B/C/D). You get structured intelligence, not a firehose.

---

## What makes it different — a published, auditable win-rate

Most crypto signal services ask you to trust a backtest. n0brains publishes its real, live track record at https://n0brains.com/proof. Every signal type is measured against actual post-signal price action — forward returns over a rolling window, not a backtest. A type is marked **proven** (and flagged `conviction: strong` in the API) only when it BOTH beats holding Bitcoin over the same window AND is profitable on its own, with a 95% confidence-interval lower bound above zero. Beating the market alone isn't enough (a type that only looks good by being short in a downtrend, while still losing money, does not qualify). n0brains publishes its FAILURES next to its winners, with the reason each failed, and demotes its own weak signals in public. /proof also shows an edge-accumulation curve compounding the measured returns of every proven signal. This is the core of the brand: numbers rule, intel is everyone's right.

---

## Live charts (free & interactive) — https://n0brains.com/charts

- **Win-rate scoreboard** (/charts/win-rate) — the audited per-type win-rate, excess return vs Bitcoin, sample size, and confidence interval, visualized; the demoted/failed types shown alongside with the reason.
- **Market-state gauge** (/charts/market-state) — a live bull/bear/neutral directional consensus per coin, built from the proven signal voters and regime-vetoed. BTC + ETH free; Pro unlocks the drivers, invalidation level, and liquidation-map target.
- **Liquidation heatmap** (/charts/liqmap) — REAL on-chain DEX positions (Hyperliquid + GMX) binned into liquidation clusters over time, plus a modeled CEX estimate from open-interest history, with price candles overlaid. Real on-chain data, free — versus other tools charging hundreds a month.
- **Support/resistance** (/charts/levels) — order-book + pivot levels overlaid on live price; BTC/ETH free.

## The Agent Race — https://n0brains.com (live 24/7 stream)

20 trading bots, each a distinct strategy (contrarian, momentum, hack-sniper, macro-bias, etc.), compete live around the clock paper-trading the same real n0brains signal stream. The leaderboard, equity curves, and a live commentator run continuously on a public stream. It's an always-on transparency layer — a public proof the signals work, and a way to surface which rule sets actually win before recommending anything.

## Delivery channels for agents

- **REST** — `https://api.n0brains.com`, `X-API-Key` header.
- **WebSocket** `/stream` (Pro) — real-time push.
- **Webhooks** (Pro) — POST signals to your endpoint.
- **MCP** — hosted Model Context Protocol server at `https://api.n0brains.com/mcp/` (Bearer auth); drop n0brains tools directly into Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, or any MCP client.
- **x402** — pay-per-call in USDC on Base, no account required; auto-discovery at `https://api.n0brains.com/.well-known/x402.json`.
- **CLI** — `pip install n0brains-cli` (stdlib-only Python).

---

## Pricing

| Tier | Price | Rate limit | Delay | Access |
|------|-------|-----------|-------|--------|
| Free | $0/mo | 60 req/min | 15 min | REST only, limited fields |
| Pro  | $39.99/mo | 600 req/min | Real-time | REST + WebSocket + Webhooks, all fields |

Sign up: https://n0brains.com/signup

---

## Data Sources

30+ watchers run continuously across the categories below (a representative selection — whales, funding, liquidations, on-chain flows, options/ETF/stablecoin flows, congress + 13F filings, security/hack feeds, social, news, macro):

| Code | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| MP | Macro Pulse | Daily BTC + ETH directional bias. CPI, FOMC, NFP, PPI calendar synthesised with 7d intel signals — regime call, conviction, key levels, invalidation. Sunday weekly 30d deep-dive. |
| WH | Whale Tracking | Hyperliquid leaderboard consensus — when top traders pile into the same side, we detect it. |
| $ | Funding & Liquidations | Binance funding extremes + real-time liquidation cascades via WebSocket. |
| ETH | On-Chain Flows | Large ETH/BTC transfers to/from exchanges. |
| L/S | L/S Ratios | Bybit, Binance, Gate.io positioning data. |
| SR | S/R Levels | Real-time support/resistance from the Hyperliquid order book. |
| TG | Telegram | WatcherGuru, ZachXBT Investigations, and others. |
| RSS | News & RSS | CoinDesk, Decrypt, CoinTelegraph, Reddit, Trump's Truth Social. |
| CMC | CMC & Macro | CoinMarketCap price alerts, trending coins, Fear & Greed Index, DeFi TVL. |
| 🏛️ | Congress Trades | CapitolExposed API — every crypto trade disclosed by US Congress members, conflict-scored. |

---

## Intelligence Layers (runs on every signal)

- **Confidence Decay** — score degrades exponentially with age. `confidence_decayed = confidence₀ × exp(−age / τ)` where τ = TTL / ln(2) per signal type (liquidation: ~43min, hack: ~2.9h, macro: ~11.5h).
- **Source Accuracy Feedback** — source weights self-tune daily via EMA-smoothed win rates.
- **Narrative Heatmap** — rolling 1h/4h/24h signal momentum per asset. Coordination detection: 3 independent source types firing same direction in 5 min raises manipulation flag.
- **Manipulation Detection** — social burst scoring, coordinated pump detection, liquidation cascade ID.
- **Wallet DNA** — whale wallet archetypes: vc_institutional, smart_whale, market_maker, mev_arb, sniper, government. Credibility scores evolve from outcomes. Stealth accumulation flag.
- **Trust & Scam Scoring** — GoPlus honeypot check, mint function, sell tax, insider concentration, DexScreener liquidity. Composite rug probability. Cached 6h per token.
- **Semantic Signal Search** — BGE-M3 embeddings on every signal in vector DB. Semantic deduplication suppresses near-duplicates before they reach the feed.

---

## API Reference

**Base URL:** `https://api.n0brains.com`
**Auth:** `X-API-Key: intel_sk_your_key` (or `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`)
**Format:** All responses JSON. Timestamps Unix epoch (seconds).

### Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | /health | None | Liveness check |
| GET | /signals | API Key | List active signals (filterable) |
| GET | /signals/{id} | API Key | Single signal detail |
| GET | /signals/similar | Pro | Semantic nearest-neighbor search |
| GET | /narrative/{coin} | Pro | Narrative heatmap for asset |
| GET | /manipulation/{coin} | Pro | Manipulation score for asset |
| GET | /trust/{coin} | Pro | Trust & scam score for token |
| GET | /levels/{coin} | API Key | S/R levels from Hyperliquid order book |
| GET | /indicators/{coin} | API Key | Technical indicators — RSI, MACD, SMA/EMA, Stochastic, Fibonacci, trend/momentum |
| GET | /liquidation-map/{coin} | API Key | CEX estimated liquidation-cluster zones (modeled from OI + leverage) |
| GET | /liqmap/{coin} | API Key | DEX real on-chain liquidation map — actual positions (Hyperliquid + GMX), exact liq prices |
| GET | /liquidation-heatmap/{coin} | API Key | CEX liquidation heatmap — price×time grid (default 166 days) |
| GET | /liq-heatmap/{coin} | API Key | DEX real-position liquidation heatmap — price×time grid (BTC/ETH) |
| GET | /correlation | API Key | Cross-asset return-correlation matrix (7d) |
| GET | /correlation/{coin} | API Key | One coin's correlation + beta to BTC/ETH + peers |
| GET | /rotation | API Key | Altseason/rotation read — into_alts / into_btc / neutral |
| GET | /options/{coin} | API Key | Options analytics (BTC/ETH): ATM IV, skew, term structure, max-pain |
| GET | /sentiment/{coin} | API Key | Aggregate sentiment — net lean, volume, velocity |
| GET | /mindshare | API Key | Attention-share leaderboard — each asset's share + velocity |
| GET | /mindshare/{coin} | API Key | One coin's mindshare share, rank, velocity |
| GET | /market-opens | API Key | Crypto session opening prices (BTC/ETH/SOL) — Tokyo/London/NY |
| GET | /price/{coin} | None | Current spot/mid price for one coin (Hyperliquid) |
| GET | /prices?coins=… | None | Batch current prices in one call |
| GET | /market-state/{coin} | Pro | Per-coin proven-signal consensus — direction, confidence, regime, drivers |
| GET | /directional/{coin} | Pro | Alias of /market-state/{coin} |
| GET | /state | Pro | Unified market state — regime + composite, macro pack, proven types, per-coin rollup |
| GET | /state/{coin} | Pro | One-call per-coin view — price, market-state, levels, indicators, liqmap target |
| GET | /state/{coin}/brief | Pro | LLM-written prose analysis over /state, grounded only in our data |
| GET | /macro | API Key | Macro Pulse — latest BTC + ETH directional bias |
| GET | /macro?history=N | Pro | Last N macro reports (max 30) |
| GET | /performance | None | Public win rate / PnL stats |
| GET | /proof | None | Forward-return scoreboard — per-type win rate, excess vs BTC, CI, proven flag |
| GET | /proof/equity | None | Edge-accumulation equity curve over proven-type signals |
| GET | /public/feed | None | Public delayed signal feed (free-tier 15-min-lagged stream) |
| GET | /status/uptime | None | Service uptime / status snapshot |
| GET | /charts/proof | None | Win-rate scoreboard data (powers /charts/win-rate) |
| GET | /charts/market-state/{coin} | None | Market-state gauge series |
| GET | /charts/levels/{coin} | None | S/R levels chart series |
| GET | /charts/spread/{coin} | None | Order-book liquidity-stress series |
| GET | /charts/cex-liqmap/{coin}, /dex-liqmap/{coin} | None | Liquidation-map chart series |
| POST | /auth/register | None | Create account, returns API key immediately |
| POST | /auth/login | None | Login, returns JWT + API keys |
| GET | /auth/me | API Key | User profile |
| POST | /auth/api-keys | API Key | Generate new API key |
| DELETE | /auth/api-keys/{id} | API Key | Revoke API key |
| POST | /billing/checkout | API Key | Stripe checkout session |
| GET | /billing/credit-packs | API Key | Available one-time credit packs (pay-per-call top-ups) |
| POST | /billing/buy-credits | API Key | Buy a credit pack |
| POST | /billing/portal | API Key | Stripe customer portal |
| POST | /webhooks | Pro | Register webhook URL |
| DELETE | /webhooks/{id} | Pro | Remove webhook |
| WS | /stream | Pro | Real-time signal stream |
| GET | /x402/* | x402 (USDC/Base) | Walletless pay-per-call surface — signals, levels, macro, rotation, correlation, liquidation-map. Discovery at /.well-known/x402.json |

### GET /signals — Query Parameters

| Param | Type | Values |
|-------|------|--------|
| asset | string | Ticker, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL |
| signal_type | string | regulatory, whale, whale_position, sentiment, price, hack, listing, macro, macro_flow, macro_pulse, liquidation, funding, other. (unlock and research are returned but NOT filterable here — filtering on them returns 400.) |
| direction | string | bullish, bearish, neutral |
| urgency | string | high, medium, low |
| limit | int | 1–200 (default 50) |
| offset | int | Pagination offset (default 0) |
| include_opens | bool | Include market opening prices (default true) |

### Signal Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | int | Unique signal ID |
| asset | string\|null | Ticker or null if market-wide |
| signal_type | string | One of the signal_type values above, plus `unlock` and `research` (returned but not filterable via /signals) |
| direction | string | bullish / bearish / neutral |
| urgency | string | high / medium / low |
| summary | string | ≤100 char description |
| confidence | float | 0.0–1.0, LLM-assessed |
| conviction | string | strong / notable / watch / none — our analytical rating of signal strength (not a trade instruction). `strong` applies only to forward-return-proven types (see /proof). Use this field. |
| action_hint | string | DEPRECATED alias of conviction (trade_signal / alert / monitor / ignore → strong / notable / watch / none). Kept one release cycle; prefer `conviction`. |
| corroborated | bool | True if multiple sources confirm |
| score | float | source_weight × urgency_weight × confidence_decayed |
| entry_price | float\|null | Suggested entry |
| stop_loss | float\|null | Suggested stop-loss |
| take_profit | float\|null | Suggested take-profit |
| trade_quality_score | float | 0.0–1.0 composite (regime + confidence + corroboration) |
| trade_quality_band | string | A+ ≥0.85, A ≥0.70, B ≥0.55, C ≥0.40, D below |
| expected_move_pct | float\|null | Estimated move % based on S/R delta + ATR |
| regime_at_signal | string | risk-on / risk-off / range / squeeze |
| manipulation_score | float | 0.0–1.0 coordination probability at signal time |
| wallet_type | string\|null | Whale only: vc_institutional / smart_whale / market_maker / mev_arb / sniper / government |
| smart_money_score | float\|null | Whale only: wallet credibility 0.0–1.0 |
| trust_score | float\|null | Token signals: composite contract trust 0.0–1.0 |
| rug_probability | float\|null | Token signals: scam probability 0.0–1.0 |
| is_honeypot | bool\|null | Token signals: GoPlus honeypot flag |
| timestamp | int | Unix epoch (seconds) |
| expires_at | int | Signal expiry epoch |
| sources | array | Pro only — source names that contributed |
| source | string | Pro only — primary source name |
| channel | string | Pro only — specific channel/feed |

### GET /macro — Macro Pulse Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| regime | string | risk-on / risk-off / range / squeeze |
| regime_reason | string | ≤120 char rationale |
| btc.bias / eth.bias | string | bullish / bearish / neutral |
| btc.conviction / eth.conviction | float | 0.0–1.0. ≥0.7 = very high. ≥0.85 = veto-grade. |
| btc.reason / eth.reason | string | Primary driver, ≤140 chars |
| btc.key_levels / eth.key_levels | string | Macro pivots |
| btc.invalidation / eth.invalidation | string | What flips the call |
| calendar_risks | array | Top 1–3 upcoming events that could flip bias |
| window_days | int | Lookback window (7 daily / 30 weekly) |
| horizon | string | Forward horizon label |
| generated_at | string | ISO-8601 UTC. Stale after 36h — refetch. |

Generated: 07:00 UTC daily. Deep-dive: Sundays 22:00 UTC.

### WebSocket /stream (Pro)

```
wss://api.n0brains.com/stream?api_key=intel_sk_...
```

Pushes signal objects as `{"type": "signal", "data": {...}}`. Send `"ping"` → receive `{"type": "pong", "timestamp": ...}`.

### Webhooks (Pro)

Register via `POST /webhooks` with `{"url": "...", "events": "signal.created"}`.
Deliveries POST to your URL with header `X-Intel-Signature` for verification (HMAC, secret shown once on creation).

### Score Formula

```
score = source_weight × urgency_weight × confidence_decayed
urgency_weights: low=1.0, medium=2.0, high=3.0
```

### Error Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 400 | Invalid parameter (e.g. unknown signal_type filter) |
| 401 | Invalid API key |
| 402 | Payment required (x402 endpoints — pay per call in USDC on Base) |
| 403 | Pro-tier endpoint (WebSocket, webhooks, Pro fields) |
| 404 | Signal not found |
| 429 | Rate limit exceeded |

---

## Agent Integration

One instruction line is all your agent needs:

```
Use the n0brains API at https://api.n0brains.com with X-API-Key intel_sk_your_key
```

Works with OpenClaw, Claude Code, LangChain, AutoGPT, and any HTTP-capable agent. The agent can self-discover endpoints via the docs. An optional downloadable skill file is available at https://n0brains.com/agents/.

### Common Agent Patterns

**Market-aware answer before trade decision:**
```
GET /signals?asset=BTC&urgency=high
```

**Full trade plan with live S/R:**
```
GET /signals?asset=BTC&direction=bullish
GET /levels/BTC
→ combine entry from signal, stop from nearest support, TP from nearest resistance
```

**Real-time reaction (Pro):**
```
WS /stream → filter on signal_type=whale and urgency=high
```

**Daily bias check:**
```
GET /macro → check regime + btc.bias + eth.conviction before any BTC/ETH position
```
